message:
Fix routing tests: close rig store before routing opens it

Dolt embedded mode only allows one process to hold a database directory.
The routing tests created a rigStore for populating data, then
resolveAndGetIssueWithRouting tried to open a second connection to the
same directory, causing "database locked by another dolt process" errors.

Fix: close the rigStore via io.Closer after populating it but before
the routing call opens its own connection.

Fixes: dolt-7prox

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
